name: Outlook C2 Macro Creation
notes:
This rule detects the creation of a macro file for Outlook

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: '@ScoubiMtl'
SIGMA Title: Outlook C2 Macro Creation
SIGMA Description: Detects the creation of a macro file for Outlook. Goes with win_outlook_c2_registry_key. VbaProject.OTM is explicitly mentioned in T1137. Particularly interesting if both events Registry & File Creation happens at the same time.


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5001830) FileCreate
when the event matches Filename (custom) is any of VbaProject.OTM
when the event matches File Directory (custom) contains any of \Microsoft\Outlook
TD_list: APPLY Outlook C2 Macro Creation on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5001830) FileCreate
AND when the event matches Filename (custom) is any of VbaProject.OTM
AND when the event matches File Directory (custom) contains any of \Microsoft\Outlook
RED_list: Event name: Outlook C2 Macro Creation
Event description: Detects the creation of a macro file for Outlook
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
